meaning: n.护卫(队),护送,陪同(人员),护卫队v.护卫,护送,陪同
examples: Police were called to escort her off the premises.
He arrived with a police escort shortly before half past nine.
Policemen had to escort the referee from the football field.
At night, the police are supposed to provide an escort for a woman about to give birth.
U.N. officials said U.S. forces helped escort wounded U.N. staff members to a U.N. clinic.
